arts.ttl: Juventus attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into €20m deal don’t appear to work
arts.sum: Juventus’ attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into a €20m move for Nicolò Fagioli appear to have failed. That’s according to Corriere dello Sport, who report that Juventus’ attempts to drum up interest in the midfielder in England have so far failed. arts.ttl: Milan and Inter Surpass Juventus in Revenue, but European Elite Remains Distant
arts.sum: In a historic shift, AC Milan and Inter Milan have overtaken Juventus in revenue for the first time since the 2011-12 season. This change comes in the same year that Real Madrid became the first football club to surpass €1 billion in revenue.
